trivia_bullets.text: Riptide Turtle is an original printing in Theros Beyond Death (January 2020) and has not been reprinted. The set's blue commons were largely defined by Constellation triggers, escape costs, and sea-creature flavor aligned with Thassa's domain.
sources: Scryfall: reprint: false, set Theros Beyond Death

trivia_bullets.text: "As the storm waves crushed my sailors, I cried out to Thassa. The next time I saw them, hard shells encased them, and they swam away to safety." — Siona, captain of the Pyleas. The flavor describes a divine transformation miracle in the mode of Ovid's Metamorphoses: sailors transformed into turtles by the god of the sea to survive a storm. Siona, Captain of the Pyleas (THB no. 226), is a legendary white-green creature in the same set — a seafarer who has voyaged to mystical islands and survived divine encounters.
sources: Scryfall card Siona, Captain of the Pyleas THB 226

trivia_bullets.text: A 0/5 with Flash and Defender for {1}{U}: Flash lets it ambush attackers at instant speed, and toughness-5 at 2 mana is a high ceiling for a common defender. EDHREC rank 9460 — modestly played, primarily in Thassa-themed or turtle tribal Commander shells.

related_cards.name: Siona, Captain of the Pyleas
related_cards.note: the legendary character whose flavor text appears on this card

related_cards.name: Thassa, Deep-Dwelling
related_cards.note: the god whose divine intervention the flavor text describes

related_cards.name: Arixmethes, Slumbering Isle
related_cards.note: the other iconic Theros sea-turtle creature in MTG, a massive island-turtle
